channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [JIOFIN] JFS Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results, ₹0.60 Dividend, CFO Change, ESOP
item.description:
Jio Financial Services Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Audited Financial Statements and Results for Q4 and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board recommended a dividend of ₹0.60 per equity share for FY26. Additionally, Shri Abhishek Haridas Pathak resigned as Group CFO, effective April 20, 2026, and Ms. Annapoorna Venkataramanan was appointed as the new Group CFO, effective May 11, 2026. The Board also approved the "Jio Financial Services Limited – Employee Stock Option Plan 2026," proposing 3.2 crore options, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹0.60 per equity share for FY26.
  • Abhishek Pathak resigned as Group CFO; Annapoorna Venkataramanan appointed.
  • Approved ESOP Plan 2026 for 3.2 crore options, subject to shareholder nod.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jio Financial Services Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CAPRIHANS] Caprihans India EGM on May 9, 2026, to appoint Independent Director
item.description:
Caprihans India Limited has announced an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) for its shareholders on Saturday, May 9, 2026, at 12:00 noon (IST). The meeting will be conducted virtually via Video Conferencing (VC) / Other Audio Visual Means (OAVM). The primary agenda for the EGM is to consider and approve the appointment of Mr. Sanjeev Dinkar Tole (DIN: 00128292) as an Independent Director of the Company for a term of five years, commencing from February 10, 2026, to February 9, 2031. Additionally, shareholders will vote on his continuation as an Independent Director beyond January 11, 2027, when he will attain 75 years of age. The company has provided remote e-voting facilities, which will be open from May 6, 2026, to May 8, 2026.

  • EGM scheduled for May 9, 2026, at 12:00 noon (IST) via virtual means.
  • Shareholders to vote on appointing Sanjeev Dinkar Tole as Independent Director.
  • Proposed term is five years, from Feb 10, 2026, to Feb 9, 2031.
  • Approval sought for his continuation beyond age 75 as Independent Director.
  • Remote e-voting available from May 6 to May 8, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAPRIHANS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [BLUBLND-B] Blue Blends Approves Q1, Q2, Q3 FY26 Unaudited Results; Cites CIRP Delay
item.description:
Blue Blends (India) Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 17, 2026, approved the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarters ended June 30, 2025, September 30, 2025, and December 31, 2025. These results were reviewed by M/s. Shabbir & Rita Associates LLP. The company acknowledged a delay in submitting these financial results, attributing it to the ongoing implementation of its Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) resolution plan. The NCLT approved the resolution plan on December 6, 2024, and the NCLAT later allowed a clarification regarding compliance with Rule 19A (5) of the SCRA Rules on February 18, 2026. The new management is currently undertaking processes for share allotment, re-listing, and streamlining regulatory compliance.

  • Board approved unaudited Q1, Q2, and Q3 FY26 financial results on April 17, 2026.
  • Results for quarters ended June, September, and December 2025 were approved.
  • Delay in submission is due to ongoing CIRP resolution plan implementation.
  • NCLAT allowed clarification for SCRA Rule 19A(5) compliance on Feb 18, 2026.
  • New management is streamlining compliance and re-listing processes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Blue Blends (India) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RELIANCE] RIL Board to meet Apr 24 for Q4/FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Reliance Industries Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Friday, April 24, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting includes the consideration and approval of the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend on equity shares for the financial year concluded on March 31, 2026. The company also plans to host an analyst meet following the Board Meeting to discuss the financial performance.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • To recommend dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • An analyst meet will be held post-Board Meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SARLAPOLY] Sarla Fibers Board to meet Apr 22 for Q4 results, buyback, dividend
item.description:
Sarla Performance Fibers Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 22, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider a proposal for the buyback of fully paid-up equity shares and recommend a final dividend for the financial year 2026. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results are made public.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 22, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Proposal for equity share buyback to be considered.
  • Final dividend recommendation for FY26 on the agenda.
  • Trading window closed for insiders from April 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SARLA PERFORMANCE FIBERS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JAMNAAUTO] Jamna Auto subsidiary gets GST SCN for ₹10.47 Cr demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jamna Auto Industries Ltd's subsidiary, Jai Suspension Systems Private Limited, has received a Show Cause Notice (SCN) dated April 10, 2026, from the Joint Commissioner of Central GST, Dehradun. The SCN pertains to the audit period from FY 2021-22 to FY 2023-24 and primarily concerns a demand for Goods & Services Tax of ₹10,46,80,941, along with applicable interest and penalty. The discrepancy is related to differences in Input Tax Credit (ITC) reported in GSTR-9 versus GSTR-3B. The subsidiary plans to file an appropriate response to the GST Authority based on advice from tax consultants. Jamna Auto Industries stated that the notice is not expected to have a material impact on the financial, operational, or other activities of the subsidiary or the company.

  • Jamna Auto's subsidiary received a GST Show Cause Notice.
  • Notice demands ₹10.47 Cr GST, interest, and penalty for FY21-24.
  • Dispute relates to ITC differences between GSTR-9 and GSTR-3B.
  • Subsidiary will respond to the GST Authority with tax consultant advice.
  • Company expects no material financial or operational impact from the notice.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAMNA AUTO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [CENTURYTEX] Aditya Birla Real Estate incorporates step-down WOS Prajna Properties
item.description:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited announced the incorporation of Prajna Properties Private Limited, a new step-down wholly-owned subsidiary. This new entity was formed by Birla Estates Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd. Prajna Properties Private Limited is a newly incorporated company under the Companies Act, 2013, with its primary objective being the acquisition of land and/or development of real estate projects. The incorporation involved cash consideration for initial share subscription at face value. Birla Estates Private Limited holds 100% of Prajna Properties' shareholding, making it a related party to Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd. The date of incorporation for Prajna Properties was April 3, 2026.

  • Aditya Birla Real Estate's subsidiary incorporated a new WOS.
  • Prajna Properties is a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • The new entity will focus on real estate project development.
  • Birla Estates Private Limited holds 100% of its shares.
  • Incorporation was for land acquisition and project development.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY TEXTILES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [ZENSARTECH] Zensar Board to meet Apr 24 for Q4 FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Zensar Technologies Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Friday, April 24, 2026. The primary agenda for the meeting includes considering and approving the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26, if any. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the Q4-FY2025-26 financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and full-year FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board to consider recommending a dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZENSAR TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [YURANUS] Yuranus Infra FY26 Audited Results Approved; Recommends ₹0.10 Dividend
item.description:
Yuranus Infrastructure Ltd announced the approval of its audited standalone financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, by the Board of Directors. The company's statutory auditors, PKN & Co., issued an unmodified opinion on the financial statements. Additionally, the Board recommended a final dividend of ₹0.10 per equity share (face value ₹10 each), which is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting.

  • FY26 audited standalone financial results approved by Board.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial statements.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.10 per equity share recommended.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yuranus Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BLUBLND-B] Blue Blends Approves Unaudited Q1, Q2, Q3 FY26 Results
item.description:
Blue Blends (India) Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 17, 2026, approved and took on record the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial statements for three quarters: June 30, 2025, September 30, 2025, and December 31, 2025. The company clarified that there was a delay in submitting these results due to its Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), which concluded with the NCLT approving a resolution plan on December 6, 2024. The implementation of the approved resolution plan, including share allotment and re-listing processes, is currently underway. The new management is actively working to streamline operations and ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements, addressing the previous delays.

  • Board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q1, Q2, and Q3 FY26.
  • Results cover quarters ending June 30, September 30, and December 31, 2025.
  • Delay in submission attributed to the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP).
  • NCLT approved the resolution plan on December 6, 2024, with implementation ongoing.
  • New management is actively ensuring compliance and statutory filings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Blue Blends (India) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
